Text.text: Cinema reserves the right to cancel or modify showtimes without prior notice due to low occupancy, technical issues, or other operational reasons.
2. Ticket is compulsory for Children of 3 Years age & Above.
3. Please Carry ID Proof for movies Certified with ``A`` Certificate.
4. Once Ticket Purchased cannot be Cancelled or refunded.
5. Outside food and beverages are not allowed into the theatre premises.
6. Items like Laptops, Cameras, Lighters, Matchboxes, Cigarettes or any Inflammable objects are not allowed into the theatre premises.
7. Helmets, carry bags, eatables or handbags are not allowed into the theatres, please deposit at the Baggage counter provided.
8. Only Online booking partner server messages are allowed.
9. Printout & forwarded messages are not allowed for both F&B as well as for movie tickets.
10. Customers under the influence of alcohol will not be allowed inside the theater.
11. Children under the age of 18 years will not be permitted in the cinema for A rated movies.
12. For 3D movies, ticket price includes charges towards usage of 3D glasses.
